# Purple Peaks Apps

> Purple Peaks Apps is the technology arm behind Price Services Group's digital tools — building software that helps independent insurance agents manage clients, get educated, and meet with confidence.

## Products

- [PSG Partner Portal](https://purplepeaksapps.com/portal): A back-office CRM built for independent insurance agents — lead management, e-signature workflows, client document storage, and quoting tools in one place.
- [LearnMedicare.org](https://learnmedicare.org): A free, unbiased Medicare education platform for consumers — a 6-lesson video course, interactive calculators, and a Turning 65 (T65) guide.
- Jitsi Video Rooms: Secure, self-hosted video meeting rooms for client consultations.
- [Prosperity Services Group](https://prosperityservicesgroup.com): Fixed indexed annuity and safe money planning site for retirement-focused clients.

## Company

- [Portfolio](https://purplepeaksapps.com/portfolio): The full portfolio of sites and tools built by Purple Peaks Apps for Price Services Group and its affiliated brands.
- [Contact](https://purplepeaksapps.com/contact): Get in touch about our software tools for insurance professionals.
- [Privacy Policy](https://purplepeaksapps.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](https://purplepeaksapps.com/terms)
